intended_use: Low-risk SDXL fallback checkpoint for the first queued base-generation runtime smoke lane.
prompt_notes: Use without an incompatible LoRA stack; intended as the first safe base-generation fallback lane.
negative_prompt_notes: Use the lane/package negative prompt; no model-specific negative prompt requirement is registered yet.
visual_impact: Runtime smoke image QA passed with notes; baseline SDXL composition path is proven for smoke scope, not final portfolio certification.
video_impact: None for base image smoke lane.
known_issues: Local model binary is not committed by design.
Single-image runtime smoke is not final portfolio certification.
S3 artifact transfer remains unconfigured; existing pullback used the recorded fallback path.

intended_use: SDXL RealVisXL base checkpoint for the second queued hyperreal base-generation lane after the low-risk fallback lane.
prompt_notes: Use only in the SDXL RealVisXL lane until EC2 path/hash, object-info, generation output, and image QA evidence are captured.
negative_prompt_notes: Use the lane/package negative prompt; no model-specific negative prompt requirement is registered yet.
visual_impact: Runtime smoke image QA passed with notes; RealVisXL improves the SDXL hyperreal smoke path but still needs broader multi-sample portfolio certification.
video_impact: Image base can feed later video handoff only after image QA passes.
known_issues: Single-image runtime smoke is not final portfolio certification.
S3 runtime transfer remains blocked until bucket prefix and role configuration are supplied.
Local model binary is present under ignored models/checkpoints for local development and remains uncommitted by design.

intended_use: Checkpoint component for SDXL RealVisXL ControlNet Canny lane.
prompt_notes: Use with the cleaned-control wardrobe-safe Canny v4 request unless a new QA iteration changes it.
negative_prompt_notes: Use the lane smoke request negative prompt including wardrobe and anatomy protections.
visual_impact: Target-runtime Canny smoke passed technical QA and whole-image visual QA with notes; broader multi-sample certification remains pending.
known_issues: Single-image runtime smoke is not final portfolio certification.
Hands/fingers are not certified by the target-runtime Canny smoke sample because hands are not visible.

intended_use: ControlNet Canny conditioning model for MOD-17 SDXL RealVisXL Canny lane.
prompt_notes: Use with the cleaned eye-safe Canny control image and v4 strength/end-percent defaults unless QA changes them.
negative_prompt_notes: Watch for edge artifacts, over-constrained anatomy, and control-image leakage.
visual_impact: Target-runtime Canny smoke passed technical QA and whole-image visual QA with notes; broader multi-sample certification remains pending.
known_issues: Single-image runtime smoke is not final portfolio certification.
Hands/fingers are not certified by the target-runtime Canny smoke sample because hands are not visible.

intended_use: Checkpoint component for MOD-13 SDXL RealVisXL inpaint/detail lane.
prompt_notes: Use with prepared source and mask inputs; preserve identity and composition with low denoise.
negative_prompt_notes: Block identity drift, face-shape drift, over-smoothing, and background/clothing changes.
visual_impact: One bounded no-mouth-v4 target-runtime smoke passed with notes; full-lane quality and robustness remain uncertified.
video_impact: None for this image inpaint/detail lane.
known_issues: Only one target-runtime sample is certified.
The diagnostic facial mask is a runtime input and is not promoted or treated as gold truth.
Changed workflow, model, source, mask, prompt, or scene requires scope-matched reproof.

intended_use: Depth conditioning model for MOD-18 SDXL RealVisXL ControlNet Depth lane.
prompt_notes: Use with generated DepthAnything control map and conservative strength near 0.55 for first local smoke.
negative_prompt_notes: Watch for flattened face volume, depth artifacts, muddy shadows, and background shape artifacts.
visual_impact: First local depth smoke produced a coherent hyperrealistic portrait with depth separation and passed strict whole-image visual QA with notes for low-key exposure, slight skin polish, and dark upper-right background shapes.
known_issues: Local model binary is ignored and not committed by design.
Single local smoke image is not final depth lane certification.
Hands/contact/full-body anatomy are not certified by this head-and-shoulders sample.
Target-runtime proof is lane- and scope-specific; it is not full-project certification.

intended_use: Lineart/contour conditioning model for MOD-19 SDXL RealVisXL ControlNet Lineart lane.
prompt_notes: Use with generated LineartStandard control map and conservative strength near 0.45 for first local smoke.
negative_prompt_notes: Watch for ink outlines, contour stains, lineart leakage, harsh outlines, and facial contour distortion.
visual_impact: First local lineart smoke produced a coherent hyperrealistic portrait and passed strict whole-image visual QA with notes. V2 follow-up materially improved the background from stylized vertical light strips to a natural windowed interior and slightly improved skin texture; mild skin polish remains.
known_issues: Local model binary is ignored and not committed by design.
Single local smoke image is not final lineart lane certification.
Hands/contact/full-body anatomy are not certified by this head-and-shoulders sample.
Target-runtime proof is lane- and scope-specific; it is not full-project certification.

intended_use: OpenPose pose conditioning model for MOD-20 SDXL RealVisXL ControlNet OpenPose lane.
prompt_notes: Use with generated OpenPose control map and moderate-to-strong strength around 0.75 for first local smoke.
negative_prompt_notes: Watch for skeleton overlays, colored bones/dots, pose-map staining, twisted neck/shoulders, and control-map leakage.
visual_impact: OpenPose v6 seed 711470303 completed bounded target-runtime generation, hash-verified no-regeneration pullback recovery, and whole-image visual QA with a footwear-color note.
known_issues: Only the exact OpenPose v6 full-body walking seed 711470303 target-runtime configuration is certified.
Seed 711470303 produced black shoes with white soles instead of fully white footwear.
Detailed finger, foot, toe, contact, mask, identity, and broader pose authority remain outside this certification.

intended_use: Normal-map conditioning model for MOD-21 SDXL RealVisXL ControlNet normal lane via SetUnionControlNetType=normal.
prompt_notes: Use with the exact bounded Normal v4 standing seed 711670303 configuration unless new scope-matched proof is captured.
negative_prompt_notes: Watch for rainbow normal-map leakage, warped face planes, melted geometry, collar deformation, surface color stains, and wardrobe drift.
visual_impact: The exact Normal v4 standing seed 711670303 target-runtime smoke passed technical and visual QA with notes. Other seeds, poses, controls, strict wardrobe robustness, detailed anatomy, and body-mask authority remain outside this bounded certification.
known_issues: Local model binary is ignored and not committed by design.
Union model requires SetUnionControlNetType set to normal.
Certification is bounded to the exact Normal v4 standing seed 711670303 configuration.
Strict wardrobe robustness and detailed body, hand, contact, identity, and mask authority remain unproven.

intended_use: RealESRGAN x4 upscale/polish model for MOD-12 p06_upscale_polish postprocess lane.
prompt_notes: Use only on selected generated image inputs with explicit source hash and pass-planner binding.
negative_prompt_notes: Watch for over-smoothing, painterly hair edges, false detail, and texture hallucination.
visual_impact: The hash-bound target-runtime full-body sample passed exact 4x preservation and is allowed for conditional resolution delivery only; smooth skin and clothing surfaces are amplified, no sample is preferred over its source for hyperrealism quality, and the source master must be retained.
video_impact: None for this image postprocess lane.
known_issues: Local model binary remains ignored and uncommitted by design.
The target-runtime decision is bounded to the hash-bound Normal full-body sample.
RealESRGAN increases pixel dimensions but does not reconstruct missing true detail.
No body-mask, detailed anatomy, contact ownership, or universal hyperrealism certification is claimed.

model_name: AnimateDiff SDXL v1.0 beta motion model
intended_use: Bounded local AnimateDiff fallback frame-sequence smoke using the existing Wave42 S3 mirror assets.
prompt_notes: Use only with a scope-bound SDXL checkpoint and explicit frame count, timing, manifest, and visual QA.
negative_prompt_notes: Block flicker, camera movement, identity drift, background jumps, and terminal-frame corruption.
visual_impact: The eight-frame smoke is readable but soft and overexposed, then develops background discontinuity and severe terminal-frame color corruption.
video_impact: Local runtime and frame-manifest handoff are proven; visual/temporal promotion remains blocked.
known_issues: This asset was reconciled from an existing S3 mirror rather than newly downloaded from the original publisher.
Frames 5-7 fail strict visual continuity; frame 7 is severely corrupted.
The bounded local smoke is not target-runtime or production video-lane certification.

visual_impact: One hash-bound 480x640 49-frame target-runtime clip passed technical decode and direct temporal visual QA; broader production robustness remains unproven.
known_issues: Only one source, seed, two-second profile, and approved EC2 target have been validated; longer duration, multiseed, and source-diversity robustness are not certified.
